project_area: Innovative community solutions across five categories: Reliable & Accessible Infrastructure, Ready & Successful Students, Thriving & Healthy Residents, Safe & Engaged, Clean & Sustainable Environment
demographic_requirements: Must demonstrate equitable partnerships with other non-profit organizations and provide direct services to Howard County residents.
eligibility_summary: Applicants must be 501(c)(3) non-profits in good standing, providing direct services to Howard County residents, and demonstrating collaboration with other non-profits. Funding is restricted to projects within Howard County, Maryland.
